---
title: "taste.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\wardens\taste.py"
loc: 55
complexity: 10
logic_score: 6.57
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 5.76
overall_score: 3.70
---

## Intent
The `taste.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TasteWarden, scan. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TasteWarden, scan. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)

### Exports
- `TasteWarden`
- `scan`
